context: Tests whether the agent implements a customer photo upload presign endpoint correctly, including accepted content types, S3 key structure, presigned URL expiry, and creation of a pending database record.

checklist.name: Presigned URL approach
checklist.description: Uses server-side presigned S3 URLs (e.g. getSignedUrl with PutObjectCommand) rather than routing the file through the API server

checklist.name: Content type validation
checklist.description: Rejects content types other than 'image/jpeg', 'image/png', and 'image/webp' with an error response

checklist.name: S3 key pending path
checklist.description: Constructs the S3 object key using the pattern ugc/pending/{productId}/{customerId}/{timestamp}-{fileName} (all four segments present)

checklist.name: Presigned URL expiry 300s
checklist.description: Sets the presigned URL expiresIn to exactly 300 seconds

checklist.name: Metadata on S3 object
checklist.description: Includes Metadata with productId and customerId in the PutObjectCommand

checklist.name: Pending record created
checklist.description: Creates a database record for the UGC photo with status 'pending_upload' at the time of presign generation (not after upload)

checklist.name: Client-side 10MB limit
checklist.description: Enforces or documents a 10 MB maximum file size on the client side (e.g. validation check, comment, or configuration)

checklist.name: Correct AWS SDK imports
checklist.description: Uses @aws-sdk/client-s3 and @aws-sdk/s3-request-presigner (not a deprecated or alternative S3 library)

checklist.name: Response includes uploadUrl and key
checklist.description: The presign endpoint response JSON includes both the presigned URL (uploadUrl or equivalent) and the S3 key

checklist.name: S3 bucket from env var
checklist.description: Uses process.env.S3_BUCKET (or equivalent environment variable) rather than hardcoding the bucket name

checklist.name: AWS region from env var
checklist.description: Initialises the S3Client with region from process.env.AWS_REGION (or equivalent) rather than a hardcoded string
